ai_coach.headline: No data logged today -- zero visibility into adherence, so tomorrow starts with closing that gap.
ai_coach.readiness_assessment: No telemetry synced (sleep, HRV, RHR, steps, body battery all missing), so recovery state is unknown tonight. Without this data, tomorrow's training call has to default to conservative until numbers come back online.
action_plan: Log tonight's weight first thing tomorrow morning to re-anchor the glide path
Sync sleep/HRV/RHR data before tomorrow's session so readiness can actually be assessed
Log all meals in real time tomorrow against the 2300 kcal / 215P / 200C / 66F Rest/Zone 2 target
If a gym or Zone 2 session happens tomorrow, log it in Hevy/running tracker immediately after
Set a phone reminder for evening check-in tomorrow so today's zero-data gap doesn't repeat
ai_coach.nutrition_directive: Today's Rest/Zone 2 target was 2300 kcal, 215g protein, 200g carbs, 66g fat, but nothing was logged -- tomorrow, log meals as you eat them so intake can be checked against this target in real time rather than after the fact.
ai_coach.weight_trend_note: No weight entries exist yet, so there's no glide path comparison possible -- get a weigh-in logged tomorrow morning to start building the trend line against the 83.0 kg target.
risk_flags: Zero telemetry, nutrition, gym, or weight data logged today -- adherence cannot be verified at all
Gym consistency shows 0 of 4 scheduled days logged this cycle -- confirm whether sessions were skipped or just not logged

overview.summary: Every metric (weight, RHR, HRV, sleep, steps, body battery) is blank today, so there's no way to synthesize how the day actually went.
overview.suggestion: Open the tracking app tomorrow morning and log weight plus sync wearable data before doing anything else.

plan.summary: With zero weight history logged, progress against the 83.0 kg target and phase milestones can't be evaluated at all.
plan.suggestion: Log a weigh-in tomorrow at the same time/conditions to establish the first real data point against the glide path.

training.summary: Readiness and load are both null and gym adherence sits at 0 of 4 scheduled days -- there's no basis to judge whether today's rest was planned or a missed session.
training.suggestion: Check tomorrow's schedule and, if it's a scheduled gym day, log the session in Hevy the moment it's done to restart the adherence count.

gym.summary: No session data exists to review, so it's unclear what the last lift or working weight was.
gym.suggestion: Pull up the last logged Hevy session before tomorrow's workout to confirm the current working weights and protect bar velocity on the first compound lift.

sleep.summary: No sleep data was captured for last night, so quality, duration, and stress trend are all unknown.
sleep.suggestion: Wear the tracker to bed tonight and check that sleep data syncs by morning so tomorrow's readiness read isn't blank again.

nutrition.summary: Nothing was logged against the 2300 kcal Rest/Zone 2 target today, so intake vs. target is a complete unknown.
nutrition.suggestion: Log each meal tomorrow as it's eaten, keeping an eye on hitting 215g protein first before filling remaining calories.
